query:
ALTER TABLE `petition_signatures` 
DROP COLUMN `phone`,
DROP COLUMN `city`,
DROP COLUMN `state`,
ADD COLUMN `city` varchar(100) NOT NULL AFTER `email`,
ADD COLUMN `state` varchar(2) NOT NULL AFTER `city`,
ADD UNIQUE KEY `petition_signatures_cnf_unique` (`cnf`);
